reason: Stage/module ownership and shared contract placement for editing/exporter changes.
Exporter quality, edit-plan rendering, subtitle burn-in, and FFmpeg command contracts.
Durable JSONL/state contracts, postprocess stage behavior, and exporter failure semantics.
Typed models, idempotency, and durable UTF-8 state requirements.
Missing/invalid local asset handling must preserve forward progress.
Compact operator-visible skip/fallback logs and exporter audit consistency.
Reuse existing edit-plan/exporter patterns instead of duplicating command logic.
Feature spans config, planner, manifest, exporter, reset/status, and tests.
